description_long: This is a robust, cubic wooden storage box constructed from dark, weathered planks arranged vertically and framed by thicker wooden beams. Each visible face features a diagonal support beam, enhancing both structural integrity and visual interest. The wood grain is prominent, with a slightly glossy finish that suggests the box has been treated or varnished for durability. The top appears to be open or recessed, lacking any visible lid or closure mechanism. There are no handles, locks, or labeling areas present, giving the box a utilitarian and rustic appearance. Its design is typical of crates used for storage or transport in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden storage box with diagonal support beams and a glossy, weathered finish. The box is open-topped and lacks handles, locks, or labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing vertical wooden planks, a diagonal support beam, and a glossy, weathered surface.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same plank and diagonal beam arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually matching the front and side, with no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again mirroring the other faces with the same construction details.
